messages.content: Today was a good day to find stock’s that are relatively strong. The ones that help up well while $SPY / $QQQ were -2% are the ones that should fly when market conditions recover.

Have seen this $**QQQ** triangle pattern back in Q2/Q3 with $**SPOT**. Looks very similar to me with the setup.

$**SPOT** has fallen 28% since breaking the triangle downward. Hoping $**QQQ** doesn’t play out the same __but if it starts to confirm this move down__ I am thinking downside to about $585-575 in the coming month.
Will need broader market support for a move^
Liking the look of $ALAB. I think it’s ready for a move. $185 is the pivot I’ve been watching

Using this 3-day weekend from the markets to recover the mental capital.
Excited to trade again Tuesday thru Thursday this week. Will be taking off from the markets this Friday. 🏂 🏔️
